title: pilosella rothiana subsp. arenaria
intro: Pilosella rothiana subsp. arenaria, also known as the Alpine Mouse-ear or Arenaria Mouse-ear, is a rare and endangered plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Pilosella rothiana subsp. arenaria has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which may help in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting digestive health. Pilosella rothiana subsp. arenaria can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
